metadata.title:
TELLS THE STORY OF


P|NKERTON'S PERF|DY

pages.raw_text:
BOISE. July 1.-When court re-
convened today for the hfty-hrst
day of the Haywood trial, Morris
Friedman, formerly stenographer
for the Denver Pinkerton agency,
was recalled and a fight to get into
the evidence records he copied
while there began. The COM
potency OF these documents is Sc
nously questioned by the prosecu-
ton.


Arguments were length and tech
meal.


Judge Wood admitted the re-
ports of Friedman. Much OF it 10
rehash Of previous testimony. and
all reports showed that Pinkertons
absolutely controlled the situation
In every union. When the luncheon
recess was called barrow was still
reading from the reports.
